title: stevia serrata var. linoides
intro: Stevia serrata var. linoides, also known as Stevia linoides, is a plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to South America. It is a perennial herb that has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Stevia linoides can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
